blended.narrative: Montana Snowbowl is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.1 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,303 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 16.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 6" over the past week. Current depth: 75".
